output.formatted:
Unable to retrieve political party leaders in Romania due to potential database or query structure issues. The correct SPARQL query format appears to be valid, but no results were returned in all attempts. This may indicate missing data in the Wikidata QLever endpoint or an incorrect property mapping.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?leader ?leaderLabel WHERE {
  ?party wdt:P31 wd:Q35172 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q129 ; wdt:P1127 ?leader .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en"
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 2 columns
